M0-T001.name: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.html with DOCTYPE, meta, viewport, CDN scripts, Phaser 3 CDN, and complete body structure with HUD, Phaser container, chord prompt, keyboard, and overlay divs
M0-T001.description: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.html with DOCTYPE, meta, viewport, CDN scripts, Phaser 3 CDN, and complete body structure with HUD, Phaser container, chord prompt, keyboard, and overlay divs

M0-T002.name: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.css with flexbox layout for 4-zone vertical split (HUD, canvas, prompt, keyboard)
M0-T002.description: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.css with flexbox layout for 4-zone vertical split (HUD, canvas, prompt, keyboard)

M0-T003.name: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.js with skeleton structure including Phaser config and BattleBridge class stub
M0-T003.description: Create neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.js with skeleton structure including Phaser config and BattleBridge class stub

M0-T004.name: Verify battle.html loads in browser without console errors, Phaser canvas appears in #phaser-container, HTML piano keyboard renders, HUD and chord prompt areas visible, and page layout is correct
M0-T004.description: Verify battle.html loads in browser without console errors, Phaser canvas appears in #phaser-container, HTML piano keyboard renders, HUD and chord prompt areas visible, and page layout is correct

M1.name: Milestone 1: Phaser 3 Scene Setup and Canvas Integration
M1.description: Milestone 1: Phaser 3 Scene Setup and Canvas Integration

M1-T001.name: Create BattleScene class extending Phaser.Scene with preload(), create(), and update() methods; set world bounds and store scene dimensions
M1-T001.description: Create BattleScene class extending Phaser.Scene with preload(), create(), and update() methods; set world bounds and store scene dimensions

M1-T002.name: Create createPhaserGame() function that reads #phaser-container dimensions, creates Phaser.Game with correct width/height, sets scale.mode to RESIZE, and uses transparent background
M1-T002.description: Create createPhaserGame() function that reads #phaser-container dimensions, creates Phaser.Game with correct width/height, sets scale.mode to RESIZE, and uses transparent background

M1-T003.name: Implement window resize handler that recalculates container size, calls game.scale.resize(width, height), and notifies bridge to remap key positions
M1-T003.description: Implement window resize handler that recalculates container size, calls game.scale.resize(width, height), and notifies bridge to remap key positions

M1-T004.name: Create star field with ~100 small white circles at random positions using Phaser graphics or particle emitter, with random speed scrolling and respawn at top
M1-T004.description: Create star field with ~100 small white circles at random positions using Phaser graphics or particle emitter, with random speed scrolling and respawn at top

M2-T001.name: Create BattleBridge class with properties: keyXMap (Map of midiNote to {x, width, isAccidental}), heldNotes (Set), targetMidi (array), and internal EventEmitter
M2-T001.description: Create BattleBridge class with properties: keyXMap (Map of midiNote to {x, width, isAccidental}), heldNotes (Set), targetMidi (array), and internal EventEmitter

M2-T002.name: Implement BattleBridge methods: buildKeyXMap(), rebuildKeyXMap(), getKeyX(), noteOn(), noteOff(), setTargetChord(), checkChord(), and event emitters for bulletHit/waveCleared/gameOver
M2-T002.description: Implement BattleBridge methods: buildKeyXMap(), rebuildKeyXMap(), getKeyX(), noteOn(), noteOff(), setTargetChord(), checkChord(), and event emitters for bulletHit/waveCleared/gameOver

M2-T003.name: Wire input handlers in init(): MIDI onNoteOn/onNoteOff, QWERTY keydown/keyup using QWERTY_MAP, and mouse/touch via keyboard element delegation - all routing through bridge.noteOn()/noteOff()
M2-T003.description: Wire input handlers in init(): MIDI onNoteOn/onNoteOff, QWERTY keydown/keyup using QWERTY_MAP, and mouse/touch via keyboard element delegation - all routing through bridge.noteOn()/noteOff()

M2-T004.name: Implement coordinate mapping: calculate keyboard left edge, Phaser canvas left edge, and convert each key's center position to canvas-relative x coordinates accounting for offset between containers
M2-T004.description: Implement coordinate mapping: calculate keyboard left edge, Phaser canvas left edge, and convert each key's center position to canvas-relative x coordinates accounting for offset between containers

M3.name: Milestone 3: Enemy Spawning and Key-Aligned Positioning
M3.description: Milestone 3: Enemy Spawning and Key-Aligned Positioning

M3-T001.name: Create Enemy class extending Phaser.GameObjects.Container with child objects (glow, body, label), properties (midiNote, isAccidental, alive), and methods (spawnAnimation, die, showLabel)
M3-T001.description: Create Enemy class extending Phaser.GameObjects.Container with child objects (glow, body, label), properties (midiNote, isAccidental, alive), and methods (spawnAnimation, die, showLabel)

M3-T002.name: Implement BattleScene.spawnEnemies(midiNotes, level) that clears existing enemies, creates Enemy instances with x from bridge.getKeyX(), y based on accidental, staggers spawn animations by ~100ms per enemy
M3-T002.description: Implement BattleScene.spawnEnemies(midiNotes, level) that clears existing enemies, creates Enemy instances with x from bridge.getKeyX(), y based on accidental, staggers spawn animations by ~100ms per enemy

M4-T001.name: Implement laser rendering with layered line approach: outer line (6px, 0.2 alpha, cyan), middle line (3px, 0.5 alpha), inner line (1px, 1.0 alpha, white) using Phaser.GameObjects.Line or Graphics
M4-T001.description: Implement laser rendering with layered line approach: outer line (6px, 0.2 alpha, cyan), middle line (3px, 0.5 alpha), inner line (1px, 1.0 alpha, white) using Phaser.GameObjects.Line or Graphics

M4-T002.name: Implement BattleScene.onNoteOn(midiNote, x, isCorrect): if correct, create layered laser lines from key x-position to enemy; if incorrect, flash red column at key x-position
M4-T002.description: Implement BattleScene.onNoteOn(midiNote, x, isCorrect): if correct, create layered laser lines from key x-position to enemy; if incorrect, flash red column at key x-position

M4-T003.name: Implement BattleScene.onNoteOff(midiNote): remove and destroy laser game objects for that midiNote from laserGroup
M4-T003.description: Implement BattleScene.onNoteOff(midiNote): remove and destroy laser game objects for that midiNote from laserGroup

M4-T004.name: Implement BattleScene.onChordComplete(): pulse all active lasers to maximum brightness, trigger enemy death sequence after 200ms, clear all lasers
M4-T004.description: Implement BattleScene.onChordComplete(): pulse all active lasers to maximum brightness, trigger enemy death sequence after 200ms, clear all lasers

M5-T001.name: Create Bullet class extending Phaser.GameObjects.Container with child objects (core ellipse, glow, trail particles), properties (speed, active), and methods (update, deflect, destroy)
M5-T001.description: Create Bullet class extending Phaser.GameObjects.Container with child objects (core ellipse, glow, trail particles), properties (speed, active), and methods (update, deflect, destroy)

M5-T002.name: Implement bullet spawning logic: Levels 1-9 fire single bullet after ~1000ms ready beat from random enemy at baseSpeed + (level * speedIncrement); Level 10+ each enemy fires on staggered timer with fireInterval = Math.max(800, 2500 - (level - 10) * 200)
M5-T002.description: Implement bullet spawning logic: Levels 1-9 fire single bullet after ~1000ms ready beat from random enemy at baseSpeed + (level * speedIncrement); Level 10+ each enemy fires on staggered timer with fireInterval = Math.max(800, 2500 - (level - 10) * 200)

M5-T003.name: Implement BattleScene.update() bullet loop: iterate all bullets, call bullet.update(delta), if bullet.y > canvasHeight then call bridge.onBulletHit() and remove from array
M5-T003.description: Implement BattleScene.update() bullet loop: iterate all bullets, call bullet.update(delta), if bullet.y > canvasHeight then call bridge.onBulletHit() and remove from array

M5-T004.name: Implement chordComplete and bulletHit handlers: on chordComplete, call deflect() on all bullets and die() on all enemies; on bulletHit, emit bulletHit event and apply screen flash effect
M5-T004.description: Implement chordComplete and bulletHit handlers: on chordComplete, call deflect() on all bullets and die() on all enemies; on bulletHit, emit bulletHit event and apply screen flash effect

M6.name: Milestone 6: HP System, Scoring, Combo, and Wave Progression
M6.description: Milestone 6: HP System, Scoring, Combo, and Wave Progression

M6-T001.name: Create battleState object with properties: running, tier, wave, level, score, hp (5), maxHp, combo, bestCombo, wavesCleared, wavesMissed, waveStartTime, progressionMode, currentProgression, progressionIndex, bulletSpeed
M6-T001.description: Create battleState object with properties: running, tier, wave, level, score, hp (5), maxHp, combo, bestCombo, wavesCleared, wavesMissed, waveStartTime, progressionMode, currentProgression, progressionIndex, bulletSpeed

M6-T002.name: Implement startBattle(tier): reset all state, read progression mode checkbox, hide start screen, show HUD, call nextWave()
M6-T002.description: Implement startBattle(tier): reset all state, read progression mode checkbox, hide start screen, show HUD, call nextWave()

M6-T003.name: Implement nextWave(): increment wave counter, check level-up every 5 waves, pick next chord (random or progression), set bridge target chord, update chord prompt display, spawn enemies, record waveStartTime, trigger bullet fire after ready beat
M6-T003.description: Implement nextWave(): increment wave counter, check level-up every 5 waves, pick next chord (random or progression), set bridge target chord, update chord prompt display, spawn enemies, record waveStartTime, trigger bullet fire after ready beat

M6-T004.name: Implement onWaveCleared() handler: calculate score (basePoints=100 + speedBonus + comboMultiplier), update score display, increment combo and wavesCleared, show floating score popup, wait 500ms celebration delay, call nextWave()
M6-T004.description: Implement onWaveCleared() handler: calculate score (basePoints=100 + speedBonus + comboMultiplier), update score display, increment combo and wavesCleared, show floating score popup, wait 500ms celebration delay, call nextWave()

M6-T005.name: Implement onBulletHit() handler: decrement hp, reset combo to 0, update HP bar display, call onGameOver() if hp <= 0, else at L1-9 clear wave and spawn new chord, at L10+ keep going with remaining bullets/enemies
M6-T005.description: Implement onBulletHit() handler: decrement hp, reset combo to 0, update HP bar display, call onGameOver() if hp <= 0, else at L1-9 clear wave and spawn new chord, at L10+ keep going with remaining bullets/enemies

M6-T006.name: Implement onGameOver(): set running=false, stop all scene activity (clear enemies/bullets/lasers), emit gameOver event, show game over overlay with final stats
M6-T006.description: Implement onGameOver(): set running=false, stop all scene activity (clear enemies/bullets/lasers), emit gameOver event, show game over overlay with final stats

M6-T007.name: Implement HUD update functions: updateScoreDisplay() sets #score text, updateHPBar() sets width as hp/maxHp percentage with color classes, updateComboDisplay() shows/hides combo badge, updateWaveDisplay() sets #wave-num text
M6-T007.description: Implement HUD update functions: updateScoreDisplay() sets #score text, updateHPBar() sets width as hp/maxHp percentage with color classes, updateComboDisplay() shows/hides combo badge, updateWaveDisplay() sets #wave-num text

M7.name: Milestone 7: Levels 1-9 vs 10+ Bullet Behavior Split
M7.description: Milestone 7: Levels 1-9 vs 10+ Bullet Behavior Split

M7-T001.name: Implement BattleScene.startBulletFire(level): if level < 10 use single bullet mode after ready beat from random enemy, if level >= 10 use continuous assault with each enemy firing on staggered timer
M7-T001.description: Implement BattleScene.startBulletFire(level): if level < 10 use single bullet mode after ready beat from random enemy, if level >= 10 use continuous assault with each enemy firing on staggered timer

M7-T004.name: Update onBulletHit behavior: at L1-9 damage taken and spawn next wave immediately, at L10+ damage taken but enemies and remaining bullets persist with more firing
M7-T004.description: Update onBulletHit behavior: at L1-9 damage taken and spawn next wave immediately, at L10+ damage taken but enemies and remaining bullets persist with more firing

M8-T001.name: Add progression state tracking: progressionMode, currentProgression, progressionIndex, progressionDamaged (bool), breatherWavesRemaining
M8-T001.description: Add progression state tracking: progressionMode, currentProgression, progressionIndex, progressionDamaged (bool), breatherWavesRemaining

M8-T002.name: Update nextWave() logic to handle progression mode: if not progression mode pick random chord, if progression mode alternate between progression sequences and 1-2 random breather waves, chain progressions at L10+
M8-T002.description: Update nextWave() logic to handle progression mode: if not progression mode pick random chord, if progression mode alternate between progression sequences and 1-2 random breather waves, chain progressions at L10+

M8-T003.name: Implement showProgressionComplete(name) function: display 'Progression Complete!' banner in Phaser scene with progression name, tween scale up/hold 1s/fade out
M8-T003.description: Implement showProgressionComplete(name) function: display 'Progression Complete!' banner in Phaser scene with progression name, tween scale up/hold 1s/fade out

M8-T004.name: Implement playProgressionReplay(progression) function: use audio.playChord() to replay each chord in progression sequentially with ~400ms gaps for cosmetic/musical payoff
M8-T004.description: Implement playProgressionReplay(progression) function: use audio.playChord() to replay each chord in progression sequentially with ~400ms gaps for cosmetic/musical payoff

M8-T005.name: Update progression HUD display: #progression-info text shows progression name and position e.g. 'Jazz ii-V-I (2/3)' when in progression mode
M8-T005.description: Update progression HUD display: #progression-info text shows progression name and position e.g. 'Jazz ii-V-I (2/3)' when in progression mode

M9.name: Milestone 9: Difficulty Scaling and Level 15+ Random Positioning
M9.description: Milestone 9: Difficulty Scaling and Level 15+ Random Positioning

M9-T001.name: Implement difficulty scaling: bullet speed scales from 48px/s (L1) to 200px/s cap (L20+); fire mode switches from single (L1-9) to continuous (L10+); fire interval decreases from 2500ms to 700ms floor; ready beat decreases from 1500ms to 500ms
M9-T001.description: Implement difficulty scaling: bullet speed scales from 48px/s (L1) to 200px/s cap (L20+); fire mode switches from single (L1-9) to continuous (L10+); fire interval decreases from 2500ms to 700ms floor; ready beat decreases from 1500ms to 500ms

M9-T002.name: Update BattleScene.spawnEnemies() to support random positioning at L15+: if level >= 15 generate random x within padding bounds and random y in top 40%, show note labels; otherwise use key-aligned positioning
M9-T002.description: Update BattleScene.spawnEnemies() to support random positioning at L15+: if level >= 15 generate random x within padding bounds and random y in top 40%, show note labels; otherwise use key-aligned positioning

M9-T003.name: Scale ready beat timing: L1-4 1500ms, L5-9 1000ms, L10-14 800ms, L15+ 500ms
M9-T003.description: Scale ready beat timing: L1-4 1500ms, L5-9 1000ms, L10-14 800ms, L15+ 500ms

M9-T004.name: Scale enemy spawn animation speed: lower levels 500ms drop-in, higher levels 300ms drop-in for faster appearance
M9-T004.description: Scale enemy spawn animation speed: lower levels 500ms drop-in, higher levels 300ms drop-in for faster appearance

M10-T001.name: Create procedural particle textures: generate 4x4 white pixel canvas texture for particle emitters
M10-T001.description: Create procedural particle textures: generate 4x4 white pixel canvas texture for particle emitters

M10-T002.name: Implement enemy death particles: 20-30 particles on death burst with 50-200 speed, 400ms lifespan, tint matching enemy color, slight downward gravity, scale 1.0->0; screen shake on last enemy (200ms, intensity 0.005)
M10-T002.description: Implement enemy death particles: 20-30 particles on death burst with 50-200 speed, 400ms lifespan, tint matching enemy color, slight downward gravity, scale 1.0->0; screen shake on last enemy (200ms, intensity 0.005)

M10-T003.name: Implement bullet trail particles: attached to Bullet instance, emitter follows bullet position, red/orange tint, 5-8 particles per frame, 200ms lifespan
M10-T003.description: Implement bullet trail particles: attached to Bullet instance, emitter follows bullet position, red/orange tint, 5-8 particles per frame, 200ms lifespan

M10-T004.name: Implement bullet deflect particles: white/cyan burst similar to death but fewer particles, plus small flash ellipse with scale tween 0->2 and alpha 1->0 over 200ms
M10-T004.description: Implement bullet deflect particles: white/cyan burst similar to death but fewer particles, plus small flash ellipse with scale tween 0->2 and alpha 1->0 over 200ms

M10-T005.name: Implement screen shake: create BattleScene.shakeCamera(intensity, duration) using this.cameras.main.shake(); on wave clear shake(200, 0.005), on bullet hit shake(150, 0.008)
M10-T005.description: Implement screen shake: create BattleScene.shakeCamera(intensity, duration) using this.cameras.main.shake(); on wave clear shake(200, 0.005), on bullet hit shake(150, 0.008)

M10-T006.name: Implement screen flash CSS effect: on bullet hit add .damage-flash class to #battle-container with animation damageFlash 300ms (0% rgba(255,0,0,0.3) -> 100% transparent), remove class after animation
M10-T006.description: Implement screen flash CSS effect: on bullet hit add .damage-flash class to #battle-container with animation damageFlash 300ms (0% rgba(255,0,0,0.3) -> 100% transparent), remove class after animation

M10-T007.name: Enhance laser glow: add very faint Phaser.FX.Glow or extra wide semi-transparent fourth line layer beneath existing three layered laser lines
M10-T007.description: Enhance laser glow: add very faint Phaser.FX.Glow or extra wide semi-transparent fourth line layer beneath existing three layered laser lines

M10-T008.name: Implement HP crack animation: on HP decrease, HP bar briefly shakes and HP text flashes red
M10-T008.description: Implement HP crack animation: on HP decrease, HP bar briefly shakes and HP text flashes red

M10-T009.name: Implement combo celebration: at milestones (5x, 10x), brief golden particle fountain from score display position, text 'Nx COMBO!' appears in Phaser scene and tweens scale up then fades
M10-T009.description: Implement combo celebration: at milestones (5x, 10x), brief golden particle fountain from score display position, text 'Nx COMBO!' appears in Phaser scene and tweens scale up then fades

M11.name: Milestone 11: Start Screen and Game Over Screen
M11.description: Milestone 11: Start Screen and Game Over Screen

M11-T001.name: Create start screen (#battle-start-screen) with title 'Chordessy Battle Mode', four tier buttons (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced/Expert), progression mode checkbox, MIDI status text, click handler for startBattle(tier)
M11-T001.description: Create start screen (#battle-start-screen) with title 'Chordessy Battle Mode', four tier buttons (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced/Expert), progression mode checkbox, MIDI status text, click handler for startBattle(tier)

M11-T002.name: Create game over screen (#battle-game-over) with title 'Game Over', large final score display, stats row (Waves Cleared, Damage Taken, Best Combo, Level Reached), 'Play Again' button, optional link to game.html
M11-T002.description: Create game over screen (#battle-game-over) with title 'Game Over', large final score display, stats row (Waves Cleared, Damage Taken, Best Combo, Level Reached), 'Play Again' button, optional link to game.html

M11-T003.name: Implement screen transitions: start screen fades out (CSS opacity 300ms), game over screen fades in (CSS opacity 300ms), Phaser scene pauses while overlays visible
M11-T003.description: Implement screen transitions: start screen fades out (CSS opacity 300ms), game over screen fades in (CSS opacity 300ms), Phaser scene pauses while overlays visible

M11-T004.name: Implement state management: Phaser game created once on page load but scene paused; startBattle() resumes scene and resets state; onGameOver() pauses scene and shows overlay; 'Play Again' returns to start screen cleanly
M11-T004.description: Implement state management: Phaser game created once on page load but scene paused; startBattle() resumes scene and resets state; onGameOver() pauses scene and shows overlay; 'Play Again' returns to start screen cleanly

M12.name: Milestone 12: Navigation Links Between All Three Modes
M12.description: Milestone 12: Navigation Links Between All Three Modes

M12-T001.name: Update neural-arpeggiator/dist/index.html .mode-switch to include links to both game.html and battle.html: 'Chord Trainer | Battle Mode'
M12-T001.description: Update neural-arpeggiator/dist/index.html .mode-switch to include links to both game.html and battle.html: 'Chord Trainer | Battle Mode'

M12-T002.name: Update neural-arpeggiator/dist/game.html start screen and game over screen with navigation links to index.html and battle.html: 'Neural Arpeggiator | Battle Mode'
M12-T002.description: Update neural-arpeggiator/dist/game.html start screen and game over screen with navigation links to index.html and battle.html: 'Neural Arpeggiator | Battle Mode'

M12-T003.name: Add navigation to neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.html start screen and game over screen with links to index.html and game.html: 'Neural Arpeggiator | Chord Trainer'
M12-T003.description: Add navigation to neural-arpeggiator/dist/battle.html start screen and game over screen with links to index.html and game.html: 'Neural Arpeggiator | Chord Trainer'
